meta.titleDefault: ZenAiOS — The AI operating system for modern hospitals.
meta.description: The AI operating system for modern hospitals — 17 AI modules across clinical care, hospital management and public health, already live in real institutions.

platform.title: The Platform
platform.description: 17 AI modules across three interoperating domains — medical, administrative and AI infrastructure. One assistant, five languages, live in real institutions.

about.title: About
about.description: ZenAiOS is built by a clinical, technical and commercial team in Oradea, România — an AI operating system grounded in real hospital practice and data sovereignty.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.description: ZenAiOS is live in the field — a county emergency hospital (SJUO Oradea) and a city hall (Primăria Oradea). Real institutions, real workflows.

demo.title: Request a demo
demo.description: Book a guided walkthrough of ZenAiOS — the AI epicrisis, triage, executive dashboards and sovereign RAG — mapped to your institution.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with the ZenAiOS team in Oradea, România — by phone, email or the form. We reply within one business day.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Case studies, documentation, clinical CME and press about ZenAiOS — the AI operating system for modern hospitals.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How ZenAiOS handles personal data on this website and across the platform, including our data-sovereignty approach.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: The terms governing your use of the ZenAiOS website and the information presented on it.

footer.tagline: The AI operating system for modern hospitals. 17 AI modules across clinical care, hospital management and public health — live in real institutions.
footer.builtFor: Built for clinical-grade trust · WCAG 2.1 AA · {location}

common.liveDeploymentCount: {count, plural, one {# live deployment} other {# live deployments}}

hero.badge: Live in real hospitals & city institutions
hero.description: 17 AI modules across clinical care, hospital management and public health — already live at a county emergency hospital and a city hall.

proof.heading: Real deployments, real standards — no placeholder logos

threeDomains.description: ZenAiOS is an operating system, not a chatbot — organised into three domains that interoperate, share one assistant, and speak five languages.

audiences.description: The same platform, framed for the person reading. Management, clinicians and investors each get a direct route to what matters to them.

items.needs: ROI, interoperability (CNAS/DSP), data sovereignty, a real track record.
Less admin, accurate AI epicrisis, decision support that adds no friction, CME.
Traction, a credible team, breadth, technical moat and a clear vision.

flagship.description: A full integrated hospital system running in a county emergency hospital — the strongest proof that ZenAiOS works at real scale.

capabilities.description: Four of the things ZenAiOS does every day — decision support, triage, prediction and sovereign AI.

doctor.title: Decision support that stays in the flow
doctor.description: Context-aware differential and treatment suggestions surface where the work happens — and auto-generate the epicrisis and documents, so doctors finish faster and get home on time.

triage.title: Prioritised by real severity, not arrival order
triage.description: The Manchester protocol paired with AI classifies every patient into five levels, keeps the queue ordered by acuity, and alerts the attending physician the moment a level-1 case arrives.
bullets: Instant doctor alerts for high acuity

management.title: Dashboards that predict, not just report
management.description: Executive dashboards turn live operational data into forecasts — surges, staffing gaps, bottlenecks — with CNAS/DSP interoperability and an AI avatar for real-time decisions, on desktop and mobile.

infrastructure.title: Sovereign AI — your data never leaves the building
infrastructure.description: ZEN_RAG runs a 100% offline, local retrieval-augmented system on llama.cpp + FAISS. No cloud, no data egress — the foundation of every data-sovereignty and GDPR conversation.

outcomes.title: The numbers that are actually true
outcomes.description: We lead with what is verifiable. Efficiency figures are shown as honest projections — never unsourced claims.
outcomes.footnote: Projections are illustrative targets, pending published pilot results — not measured outcomes.

team.description: Clinical, technical and commercial leadership — the same founders who designed the platform are the ones deploying it.

default.title: See ZenAiOS running in a real hospital
default.description: Book a guided walkthrough of the platform — from the AI epicrisis to the executive dashboards — and see how it would fit your institution.

about.title: Building the future of hospital AI
about.description: Whether you're an institution, a clinician or an investor — we'd love to show you what ZenAiOS can do.

deployments.title: Let's talk about your deployment
deployments.description: Tell us about your hospital or institution and we'll map ZenAiOS to your workflows.

platformPage.description: ZenAiOS isn't a single tool bolted onto a hospital — it's a layered operating system. Three domains, one shared assistant, all speaking the same data.
platformPage.domainsTitle: Pick the layer you live in
platformPage.domainsDescription: Each domain is a coherent product in its own right — and they share one data model, one assistant and one design language.
platformPage.catalogueDescription: From the front desk to the boardroom — explore each module in detail.

categoryPage.liveCount: {count, plural, one {# live deployment} other {# live deployments}}

medical: The full clinical journey — front desk, triage, diagnosis, care, lab, management & CME
AI epicrisis with ICD-10 & DRG coding
Live in a county emergency hospital (SJUO)
administrative: RAG over legal, compliance & accounting documents
ai-infrastructure: The sovereign foundation under every other module

modulePage.roadmapIntro: Where this module is heading next — clearly forward-looking, not yet shipped.

aboutPage.description: Hospitals are some of the most complex organisations on earth. We're building the AI operating system that ties their fragmented systems into one — from the front desk to the boardroom.
aboutPage.missionTitle: One platform instead of twenty disconnected tools
aboutPage.missionP1: Clinicians lose hours every day to documentation and to systems that don't talk to each other. Management can't see what's happening in real time. Patients struggle to find the right service.
aboutPage.missionP2: ZenAiOS replaces that fragmentation with a single, AI-native operating system: 17 modules across clinical care, hospital management and public administration, sharing one data model and one assistant.
aboutPage.missionP3: It's already live — in a county emergency hospital and at a city hall — and built by people who deploy it themselves.
aboutPage.principlesTitle: Four principles we don't compromise on

principles.title: Clinically grounded
principles.body: Every module is shaped with a Chief Medical Officer and tested against real clinical workflows — not built in a vacuum.

principles.title: Sovereign by design
principles.body: Sensitive data can stay on-premise. Our offline RAG means hospitals keep control of their own information.

principles.title: Multilingual & accessible
principles.body: Five languages and an assistant that meets patients and staff where they are — care shouldn't depend on jargon.

principles.title: Proven in the field
principles.body: Live in a county emergency hospital and a city hall. We'd rather show real deployments than promise big numbers.

deploymentsPage.description: The strongest thing we can show isn't a number — it's software running in real institutions, used by real staff, every day.
deploymentsPage.noteBody: We lead with deployments rather than headline statistics. Efficiency figures elsewhere on this site are clearly labelled as projections — what you see here is simply what's running today.

demoPage.description: Tell us a little about your institution and we'll set up a walkthrough focused on what matters to you.
expect: A 30-minute guided walkthrough, tailored to your role
The AI epicrisis, triage and executive dashboards, live
How sovereign offline RAG keeps your data on-premise
A straight answer on what fits your institution — and what doesn't yet
demoPage.replyNote: We typically reply within one business day.
demoPage.sovereignNote: No data leaves the building in a self-hosted deployment.
demoPage.lookAroundBody: The live platform is open to explore.

contactPage.description: Questions about the platform, a deployment, or a partnership? Reach us directly — or send a message and we'll get back to you.

resourcesPage.description: We're building out case studies, documentation and press. Here's what's coming — and what's already live today.
resourcesPage.pointYou: and we'll point you to it.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how {name} (“we”, “us”) handles personal data in connection with this website ({domain}) and our platform. We are based in {location} and are committed to processing personal data in line with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.h1: 1. Data we collect on this website
privacy.p1a: This marketing website is intentionally minimal. The demo and contact forms are presented as a demonstration and do not transmit or store submissions. If and when these forms are connected to a backend, we will collect only the information you choose to provide — typically your name, work email, organisation and message — in order to respond to your enquiry.
privacy.p1b: We may collect limited, aggregated technical information (such as basic analytics) to understand how the site is used. We do not sell personal data.
privacy.p2a: The ZenAiOS platform processes data on behalf of the institutions that deploy it (for example hospitals and public authorities), who act as data controllers. In those settings, {name} acts as a data processor under a written agreement.
privacy.p2b: Data sovereignty. Our infrastructure is designed so that sensitive clinical and administrative data can remain on-premise. Our retrieval-augmented AI (ZEN_RAG) can run 100% offline, meaning regulated data need not leave the institution's own environment.
privacy.p3: Where we process personal data, we rely on one or more of the following legal bases: your consent, the performance of a contract, compliance with a legal obligation, or our legitimate interests in operating and improving our services.
privacy.p4: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described here or as required by law. Enquiry data is kept for as long as needed to handle your request and a reasonable period thereafter.
privacy.p5: Subject to applicable law, you have the right to:
rights: access the personal data we hold about you;
request correction or deletion of your data;
object to or restrict certain processing;
request portability of data you provided to us;
lodge a complaint with your data protection authority.
privacy.p6: For any privacy question or to exercise your rights, contact us at <email></email> or by phone at <phone></phone>.
privacy.p7: We may update this policy from time to time. The “last updated” date above reflects the latest revision.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the {name} website at {domain} (the “Site”). By using the Site, you agree to these terms.
terms.p1: This Site presents information about the {name} platform and its modules. Content is provided for general information only and does not constitute medical, legal or professional advice. Product mock-ups and illustrations shown here are representative of the platform's capabilities.
terms.p2: The demo and contact forms on this Site are demonstrations. Unless explicitly stated otherwise, submissions are not transmitted, stored or acted upon. To contact us reliably, use the email or phone number on our <contact>contact page</contact>.
terms.p3: Any efficiency or outcome figures shown on this Site are clearly labelled as projections or illustrative targets. They are not guarantees and should not be relied upon as measured results. Verifiable facts about the platform (such as the number of modules and live deployments) are presented as such.
terms.p4: The {name} name, logo, brand, text, graphics and software shown on this Site are owned by us or our licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual-property laws. You may not copy, reproduce or distribute them without our prior written permission.
terms.p5: The Site may link to third-party websites or services (for example the live platform environment). We are not responsible for the content or practices of those third parties.
terms.p6: The Site is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent permitted by law. We are not liable for any loss arising from your use of, or reliance on, the Site.
terms.p7: These terms are governed by the laws of România, without regard to conflict-of-laws principles. Any disputes will be subject to the competent courts of România.
terms.p8: Questions about these terms? Contact us at <email></email>.

medical.name: Medical

administrative.name: Administrative
administrative.label: Category B — Administrative
administrative.description: Civic management, administrative processes and RAG-based compliance — already live in a public institution.

ai-infrastructure.name: AI Infrastructure
ai-infrastructure.label: Category C — General
ai-infrastructure.description: AI tooling, local models and RAG infrastructure — the offline-capable technical foundation the whole platform is built on.

sjuo-oradea.summary: The flagship deployment: a full integrated hospital system running in a county emergency hospital.
live: Electronic FOCG with ICD-10 & DRG coding

oradea-city-hall.summary: A civic deployment proving ZenAiOS reaches beyond the hospital into public administration.

george.bio: Sets the vision and takes ZenAiOS to institutions, partners and investors.

vlad.bio: Leads the platform and the in-house AI infrastructure — from sovereign RAG to the 17 modules.

horea.bio: Keeps every module grounded in real clinical practice and standards of care.

florina.bio: Brings ZenAiOS to hospitals and public institutions across the region.

lazar.bio: Builds the partnerships that put ZenAiOS to work in clinics and city halls.

loujaina.bio: Supports institutions through every step of their ZenAiOS rollout.

vision.text: Healthcare is complex. Our job is to make it run — one AI operating system, from the front desk to the boardroom.

zenaios-hospital.name: ZenAiOS Hospital — SJUO
zenaios-hospital.summary: Integrated hospital management deployed at Spitalul Județean de Urgență Oradea — beds, FOCG with ICD-10 & DRG coding, AI epicrisis and the ZenA assistant in one system.
zenaios-hospital.problem: Hospital data lives in disconnected systems, so clinicians re-key information and management never has a live picture. ZenAiOS Hospital unifies the clinical record, coding and operations on one AI-native platform.
how: Electronic FOCG (observation chart) with ICD-10 & DRG coding
ZenA assistant embedded for staff, with voice support

patient.name: Patient Module
patient.summary: Online appointments, result access, AI communication, symptom monitoring and personalised guidance for patients.
patient.problem: Patients struggle to reach the right service and to understand their next step. The Patient Module gives them a guided, multilingual front door to care.
how: Secure access to results and records
AI symptom monitoring and personalised guidance

doctor.name: Doctor Module
doctor.summary: AI decision support for diagnosis and treatment, automatic epicrisis and document generation, and workflow optimisation for physicians.
doctor.problem: Doctors lose hours to documentation and context-switching. The Doctor Module brings decision support and auto-generated notes into the clinical flow, not on top of it.
how: Evidence-aware guidance at the point of care

nursing.name: Nursing Module
nursing.summary: Treatment administration, vital-sign monitoring, procedural checklists and care-team communication for nursing staff.
nursing.problem: Care delivery depends on accurate, timely coordination. The Nursing Module keeps administration, vitals and checklists in one place and the whole care team in sync.

emergency-triage.name: Emergency Triage
emergency-triage.summary: Manchester protocol combined with AI to classify patients into five severity levels, auto-prioritise the queue and alert doctors.
emergency-triage.problem: In a busy emergency department, prioritisation has to be fast and defensible. Triage pairs the Manchester standard with AI to keep the queue ordered by real severity.
how: Manchester + AI classification into 5 severity levels

laboratory.name: Laboratory Module
laboratory.summary: Sampling, processing and AI interpretation with pathological-value highlighting and automatic FOCG integration.
laboratory.problem: Lab results need to reach the right chart, flagged and in context. The Laboratory Module connects the bench to the observation chart automatically.

labiq.name: LabIQ
labiq.summary: AI analysis of lab reports from PDF or image uploads, with plain-language explanations and follow-up guidance.
labiq.problem: A lab report is hard to read for most people. LabIQ turns an uploaded PDF or photo into a plain-language explanation and clear next steps.
how: Upload a lab report as PDF or image
AI extraction and analysis of values

hospital-manager.name: Hospital Manager
hospital-manager.summary: Executive dashboards, AI predictive analytics, CNAS / DSP interoperability and an AI avatar for real-time decisions.
hospital-manager.problem: Management decisions are only as good as the data behind them. Hospital Manager turns live operational data into forecasts and answers leadership can act on.
how: AI predictive analytics for demand and staffing
AI avatar for real-time decision support

manager-mobile.name: Manager Mobile Dashboard
manager-mobile.summary: Mobile oversight of departments, staffing, alerts and finance, with a manager AI assistant in your pocket.
manager-mobile.problem: Leadership is rarely at a desk. The Manager Mobile Dashboard puts the operational picture and an AI assistant on the phone, designed mobile-first.
how: Departments, staffing and finance at a glance
Push alerts for what needs attention

risk-assessment.name: Risk Assessment
risk-assessment.summary: An AI risk workspace with probability bands, time windows and an overall risk tier.
risk-assessment.problem: Risk is a moving target. This workspace makes probability, timing and overall tier explicit, so clinical decisions are grounded and reviewable.

data-collection.name: Hospital Data Collection
data-collection.summary: Admissions, master data, bed maps, insurance, pharmacy and reporting in one structured workspace.
data-collection.problem: Clean structured data is the foundation everything else runs on. This module captures it once, at the source, and keeps it consistent across the hospital.

quiz.name: QUIZ Module
quiz.summary: Accredited CME for doctors and residents: AI-generated adaptive clinical cases, competency evaluation and certified CME hours.
quiz.problem: Continuing education competes with clinical time. The QUIZ Module makes CME adaptive and case-based, so learning fits real schedules and counts.

analytics.name: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.summary: A standalone dashboard for the chat-widget analytics system, powered by live telemetry.
analytics.problem: If the assistant is the front door, its analytics are the floor plan. This dashboard makes conversation telemetry legible and actionable.
how: Live telemetry from the chat widget

citizen.name: Citizen Module — Oradea City Hall
citizen.summary: AI-generated reports, online services, an interactive neighbourhood map and the ZenA civic assistant — live at Oradea City Hall.
citizen.problem: Citizens need a single, clear way to reach public services. The Citizen Module is the civic front door — services, maps and a multilingual assistant in one place.

administrative-module.name: Administrative Module
administrative-module.summary: RAG for non-clinical processes: legal compliance, CNAS accounting, medication management and AI hospital inventory.
administrative-module.problem: Back-office processes are document-heavy and rule-bound. The Administrative Module applies retrieval-augmented AI to compliance, accounting and inventory.

zen-rag.name: ZEN_RAG / Git_RAG_Zena
zen-rag.summary: A 100% offline, local RAG for medical and legislative documents — no cloud, built on llama.cpp + FAISS. The backbone of every data-sovereignty conversation.
zen-rag.problem: Clinical and legal data can't always leave the building. ZEN_RAG runs entirely on-premise, so sensitive documents stay sovereign while still being searchable by AI.

llm-compare.name: Zen_LLM_Compare
llm-compare.summary: A side-by-side comparator for 6+ local and cloud LLMs — same prompt, parallel responses and a latency benchmark.
llm-compare.problem: Choosing the right model is an engineering decision, not a guess. LLM Compare runs one prompt across many models at once and measures the trade-offs.
how: Same prompt sent to 6+ models in parallel
